title: Ubiquiti UACC-Camera-CJB-B - compact junction box for UVC-G5-xxx-Ultra
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / Mounting boxes and brackets / Mast boxes
description: UACC-Camera-CJB-B is a durable, compact aluminum mounting box for compatible Ubiquiti UniFi cameras UVC-G5-Dome-Ultra and UVC-G5-Turret-Ultra . The box provides space to store all cabling, resulting in a more aesthetically pleasing and damage-resistant installation. It also simplifies future maintenance The mounting box allows the camera to be mounted on a flat surface, pole, or hung. There are outlets on the side and back for installation pipes with a diameter of 3/4"
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Designed for mast diameter [mm] 38 up to 50 Design On the wall, On the mast, Ceiling Purpose Outdoor Material Polycarbonate, Aluminum alloy Weight [g] 270 Width [mm] 49 Height [mm] 147 Depth [mm] 87 Color Black
